mapper.insert: INSERT INTO coupon (merchant_id, name, type, discount, min_amount, total_quantity, user_limit, start_time, end_time) VALUES (#{merchantId}, #{name}, #{type}, #{discount}, #{minAmount}, #{totalQuantity}, #{userLimit}, #{startTime}, #{endTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE coupon SET total_quantity = total_quantity + #{delta} WHERE id = #{id} AND total_quantity IS NOT NULL
